name: agentic-plugins
description: Claude Code 插件集合，包含範例技能和損害控制安全系統

plugins.name: damage-control
plugins.description: 損害控制安全系統 - 透過 PreToolUse 鉤子封鎖危險指令並保護敏感檔案

plugins.name: drawio
plugins.description: 建立和編輯 draw.io 圖表 - 流程圖、架構圖、序列圖等視覺化圖表生成

plugins.name: github-kb
plugins.description: GitHub 本地知識庫管理員。維護 ~/workspaces/github 本地 repo 索引，支援 clone、查詢，並透過 gh CLI 搜尋 issue、PR 與 repository。

plugins.name: excalidraw
plugins.description: 建立手繪風格 Excalidraw 圖表 - 架構圖、流程圖等視覺化圖表生成，支援 PNG 匯出

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Browser automation with playwright-cli for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction

plugins.name: gh-tools
plugins.description: GitHub workflow commands for issues, PRs, and project management using the gh CLI

plugins.name: tmux-fork
plugins.description: Fork new tmux windows to spawn parallel AI agents or run CLI commands

plugins.name: anvil
plugins.description: Evidence-first coding agent. Verifies before presenting with adversarial multi-model review, SQL-tracked verification, and automatic rollback.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous improvement engine for Claude Code. Runs an unbounded modify-verify-keep/discard loop against any mechanical metric. Includes planning wizard, security audit, shipping workflow, autonomous debugger, and autonomous fixer.

plugins.name: tutor-skills
plugins.description: 將任何知識來源轉化為 Obsidian StudyVault，並透過互動式測驗追蹤學習進度。包含 tutor-setup（生成 StudyVault）和 tutor（概念級測驗輔導）兩個技能。

plugins.name: openrouter-image-gen
plugins.description: 透過 OpenRouter API 生成圖片，支援 Flux、Gemini、GPT-5 Image 等多種模型。需要 OPENROUTER_API_KEY 環境變數。

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: 極致壓縮溝通模式，削減約 75% 輸出 token 同時保持完整技術準確性。含 caveman/commit/review 技能、compress 工具及 hooks。
